overarching_purpose: Genesis of the Business Infinity MVP

action_steps.logic: Inhale the current JSON state and the Genesis Spec to establish the baseline for the Boardroom.
Solicit action proposals from the CMO and Architect agents; prioritize 'Doing things that don't scale' over infrastructure bloat.
Apply an empirical weight to agent proposals, favoring actions that align with the Immutable Purpose and provide immediate utility.
Present the highest-resonance action to the Founder for detailed feedback; log corrections to the Subconscious Ledger.
